mainText:
Promo: Bank of Entitlement - Where your every whim becomes our command!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, I strolled into a five-star restaurant, and they had the audacity to inform me that there was a 30-minute wait for a table. Outrageous! I promptly demanded to speak with the manager, and after a dramatic display of indignation and entitlement, they miraculously found a table for me, apologizing profusely. Ah, the power of being Hot Josh.
